title: Review high-speed routing for integrity
description: Walk each fast net for impedance continuity, return path, length matching, and crosstalk before sign-off.
body: Use when auditing a layout with high-speed buses or differential pairs. Do not approve high-speed routing from a visual pass alone, since integrity problems hide in plane and length detail. Actions: trace each net's reference plane, verify length-match tolerances, and inspect spacing against the crosstalk budget. Validation signals include matched lengths within the skew budget and continuous references confirmed plane by plane. Risk boundary: an unreviewed high-speed net may fail only at speed in the field, so escalate marginal margins to simulation before release.
